creator: mcgovern@spoon.beta.com
text:
When installing 2.2-BETA, the first "pass" goes properly.
However, if after the first install is complete, the user selects more
distributions (they appear checked in the menus), and tries to commit
the changes, sysinstall just rebuilds the devices, and returns. It does
not install the new distributions, and does not uncheck the boxes in the
menus.

How-To-Repeat: 
Install several distributions. Commit them to disk. When
sysinstall returns, select other distributions, and attempt to commit.
